ddls:
CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log event */,
  "time" INTEGER /* Timestamp of the log event */,
  "thread" TEXT /* Thread information for the log event */,
  "level" TEXT /* Log level of the event (e.g., INFO, DEBUG, ERROR) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the log event (e.g., com.java.Log4jClass) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Log message or description */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the application or service generating the log */,
  "log_format" TEXT /* Format of the log (JSON, XML, plain text) */,
  "log_source" TEXT /* Source of the log (e.g., file, network, database) */,
  "log_size" INTEGER /* Size of the log event in bytes */,
  "log_context" TEXT /* Additional context information related to the log event */,
  "log_md5" TEXT /* MD5 hash of the log message for integrity verification */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the log was generated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user who generated the log (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application or service */,
  "app_name" TEXT /* Name of the application or service */,
  "app_type" TEXT /* Type of the application or service */,
  "log_config" TEXT /* Logging configuration for the application or service (e.g., log level, categories) */,
  "app_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the application or service */,
  "app_version" TEXT /* Version of the application or service */,
  "app_environment" TEXT /* Environment where the application is running (e.g., development, staging, production) */,
  "app_owner" TEXT /* Owner or team responsible for the application */,
  "app_status" TEXT /* Current status of the application (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "app_last_modified" INTEGER /* Timestamp of the last modification to the application's configuration */,
  "app_tags" TEXT /* Tags or labels for the application for easier categorization and searching */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("app_id")
)
